parameters.jsCode:
/**
 * Code: Build Xenith Payin Requests
 * 
 * Menyusun request body untuk pembuatan payin ke XenithPay API.
 * 
 * Input:
 *   - Webhook -> initiated_amount, phone_number, referenceCode, email, customerName, description
 *   - Postgres: Get Payment Channel -> method, channel
 * 
 * Output:
 *   - signaturePayload: string payload yang akan di-sign dengan HMAC-SHA256
 *   - timestamp: ISO timestamp untuk header Xenith-Request-Timestamp
 *   - body: object request body untuk POST /v1/payins
 * 
 * Catatan:
 *   - customerReference diisi dengan email sebagai contoh (bisa diganti identifier lain)
 *   - callbackUrl HARUS mengarah ke path yang sama dengan node 'Webhook: Xenith Payin Callback'
 *     yaitu /webhook/xenith-payin-sandbox. Jika tidak cocok, callback dari XenithPay
 *     tidak akan diterima dan flow Callback Payin tidak akan berjalan.
 *   - Ganti domain/base URL ke URL publik N8N Anda (ngrok/domain production)
 * 
 * Webhook URL di N8N (node Webhook: Xenith Payin Callback):
 *   - Test URL       : http://<n8n-host>/webhook-test/xenith-payin-sandbox
 *   - Production URL : http://<n8n-host>/webhook/xenith-payin-sandbox
 *   callbackUrl HARUS menggunakan format Production URL (/webhook/), bukan Test URL
 *   (/webhook-test/), karena XenithPay mengirim callback saat workflow aktif (production mode).
 *   Test URL hanya aktif saat klik 'Listen for test event' di N8N UI.
 */

// Susun request body dari data form dan payment channel DB
const body = {
  initiatedAmount: $('Webhook').first().json.query.initiated_amount,
  currency: 'IDR',
  paymentMethod: $input.first().json.method,
  paymentChannel: $input.first().json.channel,
  customerPhoneNumber: $('Webhook').first().json.query.phone_number,
  referenceCode: $('Webhook').first().json.query.referenceCode,
  customerReference: $('Webhook').first().json.query.email,
  customerName: $('Webhook').first().json.query.customerName,
  description: $('Webhook').first().json.query.description,
  // callbackUrl harus menggunakan Production URL (/webhook/)
  callbackUrl: 'https://harlee-phylogenetic-nonequivocally.ngrok-free.dev/webhook/xenith-payin-sandbox',
  redirectUrl: "https://www.weselaja.com/",
};

// Susun signature payload sesuai format XenithPay: METHOD\nURI\nTIMESTAMP\nBODY
const method = "POST";
const uri = "/v1/payins";
const timestamp = new Date().toISOString();
const signaturePayload = `${method}\n${uri}\n${timestamp}\n${JSON.stringify(body)}`;

return {
  json:{signaturePayload, timestamp, body}
}

parameters.content:
# Create Invoice

## Prasyarat
- Buat credential **PostgreSQL** di N8N (Settings > Credentials)
- Buat tabel `payment_channels` dengan kolom: `id`, `method`, `channel`, `name`, `created_at`
- Seed data dari file `payment_channels_rows.sql` pada https://github.com/RudyThongWeselAja/N8NWeselAja/blob/main/payment_channels_rows.sql

## Alur
Webhook (GET) > Postgres: Get Payment Channel > Code: Build Request > Crypto: Sign > Crypto: Idempotency > HTTP: Create Payin > Check QRIS > Email Invoice

## Input (GET Query Parameters)
- `customerName`: Nama customer
- `email`: Email tujuan pengiriman invoice (juga dipakai sebagai customerReference)
- `initiated_amount`: Nominal pembayaran dalam IDR (contoh: 50000)
- `paymentName`: Nama metode pembayaran, harus sesuai kolom `name` di tabel `payment_channels` (contoh: QRIS, VA BANK MANDIRI)
- `phone_number`: Nomor telepon customer
- `referenceCode`: Kode referensi unik transaksi
- `description`: Deskripsi/keterangan transaksi

## Contoh Request
- **Test:** `GET /webhook-test/create-invoice?customerName=John&email=john@mail.com&initiated_amount=50000&paymentName=QRIS&phone_number=08123456789&referenceCode=REF-001&description=Pembayaran+Produk`
- **Production:** `GET /webhook/create-invoice?customerName=John&email=john@mail.com&initiated_amount=50000&paymentName=QRIS&phone_number=08123456789&referenceCode=REF-001&description=Pembayaran+Produk`

## XenithPay API
- **Sandbox:** `https://openapi.sandbox.xenithpay.com/v1/payins`
- **Production:** `https://openapi.xenithpay.com/v1/payins`
Ganti URL di node `HTTP: Create Xenith Payin` saat pindah ke production.

parameters.subject: =Invoice Pembayaran • {{ $json.customerName }} • Rp {{ new Intl.NumberFormat('id-ID').format(Number($json.initiatedAmount)) }}

Amount Rp {{ new Intl.NumberFormat('id-ID').format(Number($json.initiatedAmount)) }}

Total Rp {{ new Intl.NumberFormat('id-ID').format( Number($json.initiatedAmount) + Number($json.feeAmount || 0) ) }}
{{ $json.paymentChannel?.toUpperCase() === 'QRIS' ? `

Scan QRIS untuk pembayaran

` : `

Kode Pembayaran

${$json.paymentCode || '-'}

` }}
Description:

{{$json.description || '-'}}

Terima kasih atas transaksi Anda.

parameters.content:
# Simulate Payin

## Alur
Webhook (GET) > Code: Build Simulate Payload > Crypto: Sign > HTTP: Simulate Transaction

## Input (GET Query Parameters)
- `payin_id`: Transaction ID yang didapat dari response Create Invoice (dari email invoice)
- `transaction_status`: Status simulasi — `SUCCESS`, `FAILED`, atau `EXPIRED`

## Contoh Request
- **Test:** `GET /webhook-test/simulate-payin?payin_id=txn_abc123&transaction_status=SUCCESS`
- **Production:** `GET /webhook/simulate-payin?payin_id=txn_abc123&transaction_status=SUCCESS`

## XenithPay API
- **Sandbox:** `https://openapi.sandbox.xenithpay.com/v1/simulator/transaction`
- **Production:** ❌ Tidak tersedia (simulator hanya untuk sandbox)

## Status yang Didukung
- **SUCCESS** — Pembayaran berhasil
- **FAILED** — Pembayaran gagal
- **EXPIRED** — Pembayaran kedaluwarsa

parameters.jsCode:
/**
 * Code: Build Signature Validation Payload (Payin Callback)
 * 
 * Mengekstrak data dari webhook callback XenithPay untuk
 * memvalidasi keaslian request menggunakan signature matching.
 * 
 * Input:
 *   - Webhook: Xenith Payin Callback -> headers, body
 * 
 * Output:
 *   - method: HTTP method yang digunakan (POST)
 *   - uri: webhook path yang menerima callback
 *   - body: request body dari XenithPay
 *   - xenithSignature: signature dari header x-xenith-signature
 *   - xenithTimestamp: timestamp dari header x-xenith-timestamp
 * 
 * Catatan: xenithSignature akan dibandingkan dengan expected signature
 * yang di-generate di node berikutnya untuk validasi keaslian.
 */

const method = "POST"
const uri = "/webhook/xenith-payin-sandbox";

// Ekstrak signature dan timestamp dari header webhook
return {
          method,
          uri,
          body: $json.body,
          xenithSignature: $input.first().json.headers['x-xenith-signature'],
          xenithTimestamp: $input.first().json.headers['x-xenith-timestamp'],
       }

parameters.content:
# Callback Payin

## Alur
Webhook > Code: Build Validation Payload > Crypto: Expected Signature > Check: Valid? > Email Notification

## Webhook URL (N8N)
- **Test URL:** `http://<n8n-host>/webhook-test/xenith-payin-sandbox`
- **Production URL:** `http://<n8n-host>/webhook/xenith-payin-sandbox`
⚠️ callbackUrl di Create Invoice HARUS menggunakan **Production URL** (`/webhook/`)

## Email Notifikasi
Email dikirim berdasarkan status: SUCCESS (hijau), FAILED (merah), EXPIRED (kuning)

parameters.jsCode:
/**
 * Code: Build Xenith Payout Payload
 * 
 * Menyusun request body untuk pembuatan payout (disbursement) ke XenithPay API.
 * 
 * Input:
 *   - Webhook (GET) -> query.amount, query.destinationPayoutAccount, query.destinationPayoutAccountName, query.email
 *   - Postgres: Get Payout Channel -> method, channel
 * 
 * Output:
 *   - signaturePayload: string payload yang akan di-sign dengan HMAC-SHA256
 *   - timestamp: ISO timestamp untuk header Xenith-Request-Timestamp
 *   - body: object request body untuk POST /v1/payouts
 * 
 * Catatan:
 *   - customerReference diisi dengan email sebagai contoh (bisa diganti identifier lain)
 *   - callbackUrl HARUS mengarah ke path yang sama dengan node 'Webhook: Xenith Payout Callback'
 *     yaitu /webhook/xenith-payout-sandbox. Jika tidak cocok, callback dari XenithPay
 *     tidak akan diterima dan flow Callback Payout tidak akan berjalan.
 *   - Ganti domain/base URL ke URL publik N8N Anda (ngrok/domain production)
 * 
 * Webhook URL di N8N (node Webhook: Xenith Payout Callback):
 *   - Test URL       : http://<n8n-host>/webhook-test/xenith-payout-sandbox
 *   - Production URL : http://<n8n-host>/webhook/xenith-payout-sandbox
 *   callbackUrl HARUS menggunakan format Production URL (/webhook/), bukan Test URL
 *   (/webhook-test/), karena XenithPay mengirim callback saat workflow aktif (production mode).
 *   Test URL hanya aktif saat klik 'Listen for test event' di N8N UI.
 */

const method = "POST";
const uri = "/v1/payouts";
const timestamp = new Date().toISOString();

// Susun request body dari data webhook query dan payout channel DB
const body = {
  initiatedAmount: $('Webhook: Create Payout').first().json.query.amount,
  currency: "IDR",
  destinationPayoutMethod: $input.first().json.method,
  destinationPayoutChannel: $input.first().json.channel,
  destinationPayoutAccount: $('Webhook: Create Payout').first().json.query.destinationPayoutAccount,
  destinationPayoutAccountName: $('Webhook: Create Payout').first().json.query.destinationPayoutAccountName,
  referenceCode: "REF-TEST-001",
  customerReference: $('Webhook: Create Payout').first().json.query.email,
  description: "Payout merchant TEST MERCHANT 2026-01-01",
  // callbackUrl harus menggunakan Production URL (/webhook/), bukan Test URL (/webhook-test/)
  // dan harus cocok dengan path di node 'Webhook: Xenith Payout Callback'
  callbackUrl: "https://harlee-phylogenetic-nonequivocally.ngrok-free.dev/webhook/xenith-payout-sandbox"
}

// Susun signature payload sesuai format XenithPay: METHOD\nURI\nTIMESTAMP\nBODY
const signaturePayload = `${method}\n${uri}\n${timestamp}\n${JSON.stringify(body)}`;

return {json:{signaturePayload,timestamp,body}}

/**
 * Code: Build Payout Signature Validation Payload
 * 
 * Mengekstrak data dari webhook callback XenithPay untuk
 * memvalidasi keaslian request payout menggunakan signature matching.
 * 
 * Input:
 *   - Webhook: Xenith Payout Callback -> headers, body
 * 
 * Output:
 *   - method: HTTP method yang digunakan (POST)
 *   - uri: webhook path yang menerima callback
 *   - body: request body dari XenithPay
 *   - xenithSignature: signature dari header x-xenith-signature
 *   - xenithTimestamp: timestamp dari header x-xenith-timestamp
 * 
 * Catatan: xenithSignature akan dibandingkan dengan expected signature
 * yang di-generate di node berikutnya untuk validasi keaslian.
 */

const method = "POST"
const uri = "/webhook/xenith-payout-sandbox";

// Ekstrak signature dan timestamp dari header webhook
return {
          method,
          uri,
          body: $json.body,
          xenithSignature: $input.first().json.headers['x-xenith-signature'],
          xenithTimestamp: $input.first().json.headers['x-xenith-timestamp'],
       }

nodes.name: Code: Build Payout Signature Validation Payload
Crypto: Create Expected Xenith Payout Signature

parameters.content:
# Callback Payout

## Alur
Webhook > Code: Build Validation Payload > Crypto: Expected Signature > Check: Valid + SUCCESS? > Email Notification

## Webhook URL (N8N)
- **Test URL:** `http://<n8n-host>/webhook-test/xenith-payout-sandbox`
- **Production URL:** `http://<n8n-host>/webhook/xenith-payout-sandbox`
⚠️ callbackUrl di Create Payout HARUS menggunakan **Production URL** (`/webhook/`)

# Payout

## Prasyarat
- Buat credential **PostgreSQL** di N8N (Settings > Credentials)
- Buat tabel `payout_channels` dengan kolom: `id`, `method`, `channel`, `name`, `created_at`
- Seed data dari file `payout_channels_rows.sql` pada https://github.com/RudyThongWeselAja/N8NWeselAja/blob/main/payout_channels_rows.sql

## Alur
Webhook (GET) > Postgres: Get Payout Channel > Code: Build Payload > Crypto: Sign > Crypto: Idempotency > HTTP: Create Payout

## Input (GET Query Parameters)
- `amount`: Nominal penarikan dalam IDR (contoh: 100000)
- `payoutName`: Nama metode payout, harus sesuai kolom `name` di tabel `payout_channels` (contoh: Bank Central Asia (BCA), DANA)
- `destinationPayoutAccount`: Nomor rekening/akun tujuan
- `destinationPayoutAccountName`: Nama pemilik rekening tujuan
- `email`: Email untuk notifikasi status payout (juga dipakai sebagai customerReference)

## Contoh Request
- **Test:** `GET /webhook-test/create-payout?amount=100000&payoutName=DANA&destinationPayoutAccount=08123456789&destinationPayoutAccountName=John&email=john@mail.com`
- **Production:** `GET /webhook/create-payout?amount=100000&payoutName=DANA&destinationPayoutAccount=08123456789&destinationPayoutAccountName=John&email=john@mail.com`

## XenithPay API
- **Sandbox:** `https://openapi.sandbox.xenithpay.com/v1/payouts`
- **Production:** `https://openapi.xenithpay.com/v1/payouts`
Ganti URL di node `HTTP: Create Xenith Payout` saat pindah ke production.
